EmailTemplate.name: CC Re-upload Rejection Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Re-Uploaded RERA Certificate Document Approval – {!Broker__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!ApprovalRequest.Process_Approver},
We regret to inform you that, Your uploaded RERA document is rejected for the following reason Reason for Rejection: - "{!ApprovalRequest.Comments}" Please resubmit the document in the following link. Upload Latest RERA
Regards, Runwal Enterprises.
